title: STEINER binoculars BluHorizons 10x26 - German Quality Optics, Reduces Reflections or Glare from Water, Sand or Snow, Compact and Light
features: EYE PROTECTION - Steiner Autobright technology optimizes the light transmission of the lens. No glare from sun, water or snow.
EASY FOCUSING - The Fast-Close-Focus enables minimal, stepless focusing on the center wheel for absolute sharpness from close-up to infinity.
COMFORTABLE HANDLING - The extremely compact and lightweight binoculars fit in any pocket and are ideal for on the go, when traveling and for sports activities.
CONVINCING QUALITY - Durable housing, waterproof, non-slip NBR long-life rubber armouring, functionality in the temperature range from -20 °C to +70 °C, 10 year guarantee.
ACCESSORIES - Comfortable carrying strap and unique, multifunctional neoprene carrying case.
description: BLUHORIZONS with Autobright technology - this is a sun protection factor for the eyes. Specially designed for all outdoor adventurers, the BLUHORIZONS not only fits in almost any trouser pocket, it is lightweight and also extremely robust. It is the world's first and only pair of binoculars to have photochromic lenses. That means it automatically adjusts to the light conditions, so you always have the best view, even in bright sunshine or light reflections. Because hardly anything is more annoying than being blinded at the decisive moment when you are looking at the desired motif. The BLUHORIZONS with Autobright now puts a stop to this annoyance and offers long-lasting viewing pleasure on every sunshine adventure. Without squinting your eyes and without being dazzled, you can observe the wide world in a relaxed manner.
